name: code-review
description: A verified PR review. Reads a diff, evaluates security exposure, then runs strict coverage and style checks before writing the review.

steps.instruction:
Read the full diff for PR #{pr_number}. Summarize intent, surface area,
and the riskiest changed files.
steps.title: Read Pr

steps.instruction:
Evaluate whether this PR touches authentication, authorization, secrets,
input handling, or anything network-facing. Write an artifact with the evidence. If it does touch security-sensitive code, list the security checks required. If it does not, document why no dedicated security audit is needed.
steps.title: Evaluate Security Surface

steps.instruction: Read the security-surface artifact. If the PR touches security-sensitive code, audit the changed files against the OWASP top 10 and flag injection, auth bypass, leaked secrets, and unsafe deserialization with file:line. If not, write an artifact documenting that no security audit was needed and cite the security-surface evidence.
steps.title: Security Audit

steps.instruction: Verify the PR includes tests for its new behavior and that the suite passes.
steps.title: Coverage Check

steps.instruction: Check the diff against the project's style and conventions.
steps.title: Style Check

steps.instruction:
Write the review for PR #{pr_number}: a verdict (approve / request changes),
grouped findings, and the single most important thing to fix first.
steps.title: Write Review
